# list_project_api_access_requests query

## 001_select_api_access_requests.sql

### SQLの概要

Projectの利用申請履歴を一覧表示するため、利用申請と審査結果を取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `api_access_requests`
- `projects`
- `apis`
- `api_gateway_stages`
- `api_access_reviews`
- `api_reviewers`
- `project_members`

### 引数

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `actor_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `is_hub_admin` | `Any` | no |
| `decision` | `str` | no |
| `after_requested_at` | `Any` | no |
| `limit` | `Any` | no |

### 戻り値

| 項目 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `access_request_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `project_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `api_stage_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `requested_auth_mode` | `str` | no |
| `requested_reason` | `str` | no |
| `requested_by` | `str` | no |
| `requested_at` | `datetime` | no |
| `api_code` | `str` | no |
| `api_name` | `str` | no |
| `apigw_stage_name` | `str` | no |
| `access_review_id` | `UUID` | no |
| `decision` | `str` | no |
| `approved_auth_mode` | `str | None` | yes |
| `reviewer_principal_id` | `str` | no |
| `review_comment` | `str | None` | yes |
| `reviewed_at` | `datetime` | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON p.project_id = ar.project_id`
- `JOIN ON a.api_id = ar.api_id`
- `JOIN ON s.api_stage_id = ar.api_stage_id`
- `JOIN ON rv.access_request_id = ar.access_request_id`
- `JOIN ON reviewer.api_id = ar.api_id AND reviewer.reviewer_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `JOIN ON pm.project_id = p.project_id AND pm.member_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `WHERE ar.project_id = @project_id AND (p.owner_principal_id = @actor_principal_id OR NOT pm.project_member_id IS NULL OR NOT reviewer.api_reviewer_id IS NULL OR @is_hub_admin = TRUE) AND (@decision IS NULL OR rv.decision = @decision) AND (@after_requested_at IS NULL OR ar.requested_at < @after_requested_at)`
